task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration page for the 'earthquakes' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Edit Layer' page in GeoServer for the 'earthquakes' layer (workspace 'seismic').

task_completion.description: Enable the Time dimension for the layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Dimensions' tab of the layer configuration, the 'Enabled' checkbox for the 'Time' dimension is checked.

task_completion.description: Select 'event_time' as the attribute for the Time dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Attribute' dropdown for the Time dimension is set to 'event_time'.
The 'Presentation' dropdown for the Time dimension is set to 'List'.

task_completion.description: Set the default value strategy to 'Use the biggest domain value'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Default value' dropdown for the Time dimension is set to 'Use the biggest domain value'.
Screenshot shows the Layers list page with a green success message indicating the layer configuration was saved successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web interface to configure the layer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GeoServer web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (e.g., curl) to hit the REST API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct localhost URL (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) and the GeoServer interface is fully rendered.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing GeoServer XML configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing a text editor modifying files in the GeoServer data directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layer is 'earthquakes' in the 'seismic' workspace. The Time dimension must be enabled on the 'Dimensions' tab of the layer configuration. The attribute must be set to 'event_time'. The presentation mode must be set to 'List'. The default value strategy must be set to 'Use the biggest domain value' (which corresponds to MAXIMUM internally).
